case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. ALEYDA DEL CARMEN SOZA MADRIGAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOZA MADRIGAL, ALEYDA DEL CARMEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
